title: eragrostis henryi
intro: Eragrostis henryi is a type of grass native to China, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis henryi include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Eragrostis henryi is often prepared as a tea or infused into water for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
